name: The Golf Forge - South Jordan
address: 10709 S Redwood Rd #201, South Jordan, UT 84095
about: The Golf Forge provides a refined, private environment built for golfers who want a consistent, data-driven place to train. With 24/7 access, advanced Foresight Falcon technology, and fully private simulator bays, you can practice with precision any time your schedule allows. The facility operates on a membership basis with flexible hour passes and offers training powered by Foresight Falcon technology to deliver precise ball and club data for informed improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to private simulator bays for flexible training
Advanced Foresight Falcon technology with precise ball and club data
Private, high-quality bays designed for focused, distraction-free practice
Identical layouts across two locations for consistent training experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor system with precise ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players should bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulator technology.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No mention of outside food or drink policies is provided on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time estimate for playing 18 holes is provided on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility appears to be focused on serious golf training with a private, professional atmosphere, making it more suitable for adults.
